name: List Box
description: Scrollable listbox for selecting one or more options from a visible list.

multiselect.description: Allows selecting multiple options. Adds listbox multiselect semantics.

defaultSelected.description: Initial selected option values for uncontrolled usage.

onSelectionChange.description: Callback fired when selected values change.

disabled.description: Disables listbox focus and selection interactions.

bordered.description: Adds bordered visual treatment to the listbox container.

valueToString.description: Maps non-string option values for matching/typeahead behavior.

Option.value.description: Unique option value used for selection.

Option.disabled.description: Marks an option as not selectable.

Option.children.description: Visible option content; supports simple or complex layouts.

OptionGroup.label.description: Group label announced for options in the group.

keyboard: Tab focuses listbox and lands on selected option when present, otherwise first option
Shift+Tab moves focus out of listbox in reverse tab order
ArrowDown/ArrowUp move active option without wrapping
PageDown/PageUp move active option by visible page
Home/End move active option to first/last
aria: Set an accessible name using `aria-label` or `aria-labelledby`
Disabled listbox exposes `aria-disabled=true` and is removed from tab order
Disabled options expose `aria-disabled=true` and cannot be selected

inside: Filters and settings panels with always-visible choices
Selection panes where users compare options before choosing
Scrollable lists where options exceed available vertical space
